violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Bucket was at +200 ppm cl
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. - 3 Compartment sink used for the storage of food.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling * were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. - Flooring needs work. Pieces of linoleum torn and missing.
